article_title: Burnaby Council — 7.12. CC - Telephony - Cellular Voice and Data Services 2026-04-14.pdf

briefs.title: Council to vote on $450,000 contract extension with Rogers for city cellular services
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to vote on extending its cellular voice and data contract with Rogers Communications by $450,000 (including taxes) while the city transitions to a new provider selected through a public bidding process.
briefs.action_required: No action required for most businesses — this is an internal city contract decision.
